title: Tata Steel Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Tata Steel Digital Technologies is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Steel Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Quality Control Engineer for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Steel Digital Technologies:
Tata Steel Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel Digital Technologies!
